_comment: Copy this to projects.json and edit, or run `tl init <root>` to auto-discover git repos. signals.* drive BOTH categorization and the privacy allowlist (you only observe directories belonging to a tracked project), so this file is security-relevant — not just a hint. Try it first with `tl demo` (needs no config at all).

projects.name: Acme Checkout
projects.description: Example web service — replace with your own project.

projects.name: Pricing Model
projects.description: Example data/ML project — replace with your own project.
